title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.286 - Eczema awareness month designated for the month of October
text:
9.286.  Eczema awareness month designated for the month of October. — The month of October shall be known and designated as "Eczema Awareness Month".  The citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate activities and events to increase awareness of this chronic, inflammatory skin disease.
(L. 2019 H.B. 266)
